title: sphaerocephalus haussknechtii
intro: Sphaerocephalus haussknechtii, also known as the Haussknecht's sphaerocephalus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Sphaerocephalus haussknechtii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas to harness its medicinal properties.
